query: SELECT id, customerId, customerName, facilityId, facilityName, noLotMixing, autoRun, locationPriorityPatterns, notes FROM customer_rules WHERE customerName LIKE '%Amercare%' OR customerName LIKE '%amercare%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4NCq8mAsshAuKGA.2865343ca485 --database K5ogkLhSXtccCnqH4Vm3fs --execute SELECT id, customerId, customerName, facilityId, facilityName, noLotMixing, autoRun, locationPriorityPatterns, notes FROM customer_rules WHERE customerName LIKE '%Amercare%' OR customerName LIKE '%amercare%';

rows.notes: Calgary warehouse: prioritize Building 2 locations (12#### and RCV12) over Building 1 (<12) locations.

stdout:
